title: Freshly Indulgent Italian Noodles Amatriciana
description: A cultured and indulgent Italian dish featuring noodles and a rich marinara sauce, this Tuscan-inspired recipe is a perfect blend of flavors and textures. This satvik-friendly version uses vegetarian ingredients to create a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced vegetarian pancetta to the skillet and cook until crispy.
Add the canned crushed tomatoes to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and pancetta mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the sauce for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the spaghetti and returning it to the pot.
Add the grated grana padano cheese to the spaghetti and toss to combine, adding some reserved pasta water if necessary to create a creamy sauce.
Add the simmered sauce to the spaghetti and toss to combine, seasoning with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the spaghetti hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
